_comment: DOLPHLINK team digital business cards. Email is the lookup key. The local part of the email (before @) determines BOTH the URL path (?u=<local>) AND the photo filename in the Drive folder (<local>.jpg|png|webp). 'products' references portfolios.items[].key from content.json. Set active=false to hide a former member without losing git history.

company.tagline: Singapore-based communications spine for governments and regulated enterprises
